prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: C-TERMINAL DOMAIN OF THE E. COLI RECA, NMR, MINIMIZED AVERAGE STRUCTURE. Entity description: RECA. Entry keywords: DOUBLE-STRANDED DNA BINDING DOMAIN DOUBLE-STRANDED DNA BINDING DOMAIN, RIKEN Structural Genomics/Proteomics Initiative, RSGI, Structural Genomics. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.412698; mean_interface=0.287496; max_segment_membrane_density=0.218726; mean_disorder=0.175894. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
V68 E65 generic complex control source. generic_complex_only generic complex only; complex annotation alone is not biological_oligomer_context, not obligate assembly, and not assembly_required_core.
